name: Post-Purchase Follow-Up
description: Thank you email + review request after 7 days

steps.subject: Thank you for your order, {{first_name}}!
steps.body_html:
Thank You!

Hi {{first_name}}, thank you for your purchase. We're preparing your order and will ship it as soon as possible.

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, thank you for your purchase!

steps.subject: How's everything going, {{first_name}}? We'd love your feedback
steps.body_html:
We'd Love Your Feedback

Hi {{first_name}}, we hope you're enjoying your recent purchase! Your feedback helps us improve and helps other customers make informed decisions.

Would you mind taking a moment to leave a review?
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, we hope you're enjoying your purchase. Would you leave us a review?
